_meta.description: Biblical bodies of water - seas, rivers, lakes, and pools
_meta.method: Curated list of named bodies of water in Scripture

waters.name: Jordan
waters.description: Primary river of Israel, site of many crossings and baptisms

waters.name: Nile
waters.description: Great river of Egypt

waters.name: Euphrates
waters.description: One of four rivers of Eden, boundary river

waters.name: Tigris
waters.description: One of four rivers of Eden (also called Hiddekel)

waters.name: Hiddekel
waters.description: Hebrew name for Tigris river

waters.name: Pishon
waters.description: First river of Eden

waters.name: Gihon
waters.description: Second river of Eden, also a spring in Jerusalem

waters.name: Jabbok
waters.description: River where Jacob wrestled with God

waters.name: Arnon
waters.description: Border river of Moab

waters.name: Kishon
waters.description: River where Sisera's army was defeated

waters.name: Abana
waters.description: River of Damascus mentioned by Naaman

waters.name: Pharpar
waters.description: River of Damascus mentioned by Naaman

waters.name: Chebar
waters.description: River in Babylon where Ezekiel had visions

waters.name: Kanah
waters.description: Border stream between Ephraim and Manasseh

waters.name: Cherith
waters.description: Brook where ravens fed Elijah

waters.name: Kidron
waters.description: Valley brook east of Jerusalem

waters.name: Besor
waters.description: Brook in southern Judah

waters.name: Zered
waters.description: Brook crossed during wilderness wandering

waters.name: Galilee
waters.description: Sea of Galilee, also called Chinnereth, Tiberias, Gennesaret

waters.name: Chinnereth
waters.description: Old Testament name for Sea of Galilee

waters.name: Tiberias
waters.description: Another name for Sea of Galilee

waters.name: Gennesaret
waters.description: Lake of Gennesaret, another name for Sea of Galilee

waters.name: Merom
waters.description: Waters of Merom, site of Joshua's victory

waters.name: Siloam
waters.description: Pool in Jerusalem where Jesus healed the blind man

waters.name: Bethesda
waters.description: Pool in Jerusalem with five porticoes

waters.name: Gibeon
waters.description: Pool where Joab and Abner's men fought

waters.name: Hebron
waters.description: Pool at Hebron

waters.name: Samaria
waters.description: Pool of Samaria where Ahab's chariot was washed

waters.name: Shiloah
waters.description: Waters of Shiloah that flow gently

waters.name: Marah
waters.description: Bitter waters made sweet by Moses

waters.name: Elim
waters.description: Oasis with twelve springs and seventy palms

waters.name: Engedi
waters.description: Spring/oasis by the Dead Sea
